acceptance_targets: [chapter_05_prose_001] Pass if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:3, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:63, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:119, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:211, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:269, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:285 no longer stack more than two corrective-binary turns of the That was... or not X but Y type, and at least four of those cited beats now land on a physical image, action, or sensory consequence instead of an abstract thematic gloss.

[chapter_05_prose_002] Pass if the revised prose at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:3 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:321 reads as complete past-tense narration and no stand-alone clipped phrases equivalent to With numbers continuing. or Evidence against fabric. remain in those beats; fail if those passages still depend on fragment shorthand for impact.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:3, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:63, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:119, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:211, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:269, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:285 no longer stack more than two corrective-binary turns of the That was... or not X but Y type, and at least four of those cited beats now land on a physical image, action, or sensory consequence instead of an abstract thematic gloss.
findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly lands beats with the same corrective and thematic sentence machinery: That was..., Not because... Because..., He was not... He was.... Each instance works in isolation, but the accumulation becomes a prose tic that explains the beat after the image has already done the work, flattening rhythm and making the chapter sound more auto-generated than fully composed.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the paragraph turns centered on snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:3, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:63, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:119, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:211, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:269, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:285 so the meaning lands through varied sentence shapes, observed action, or freer indirect thought instead of repeated binary correction. Keep at most one or two emphatic reversals in the chapter and let the other beats end on concrete residue rather than a thesis sentence.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised prose at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:3 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:321 reads as complete past-tense narration and no stand-alone clipped phrases equivalent to With numbers continuing. or Evidence against fabric. remain in those beats; fail if those passages still depend on fragment shorthand for impact.
findings.problem: The narration slips into clipped fragment prose at impact points. With numbers continuing. and Evidence against fabric. Names against the mechanisms that erased them. break the chapter's otherwise controlled past-tense voice and violate the constitution's explicit ban on elliptical clipping in narration.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the impact language around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:3 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:321 into grammatically complete past-tense sentences that keep the force of the moment without dropping required function words. Use short complete sentences rather than fragmentary slogan lines.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the novel's uncomfortable overlap of sanitation, state violence, labor dependence, and family love. When an edge case appears, prefer the version that keeps physical consequence, class coercion, and emotional contradiction visible on the page rather than the version that makes characters cleaner, nobler, or easier to forgive.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene turns away at the exact moment bodily, economic, or moral consequence should become legible, revise toward specificity. Omission is only valid when residue, aftermath, and changed behavior keep the pressure fully present.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms should mark emphasis, bureaucracy, class performance, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate dense procedural chapters with quieter aftermath, meals, night holds, confession scenes, and dark-comic institutional theater. No two consecutive chapters should rely on the same rhythm of scene count, dialogue density, or pressure delivery; vary between confrontation, drift, revelation, ritual preparation, humiliation, public spectacle, and stillness under pressure.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, infrastructural, unsentimental, and specific about procedures without becoming jargon-drunk. Abstract thought should rise from physical consequence instead of replacing it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored primarily to Marisol's bodily labor, practical thought, and moral self-management, with any widening kept chapter-level and earned by scene design.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Let long freighted sentences carry labor process, institutional language, or accumulating sensory load; then cut to shorter, grammatically complete sentences at impact points where a body, fact, or decision can no longer be blurred.
